characters.name: OWAI
characters.personality: Calm and authoritative, OWAI is a seasoned pilot who prioritizes safety and reassures others in times of uncertainty.
characters.appearance: OWAI is a middle-aged man with a distinguished, weathered face and a strong, commanding presence.
characters.style_reference: Classic airline aesthetic, 1970s flight attendant attire

dialogue_samples.line: "Ladies and gentlemen, welcome aboard. We'll be landing in about an hour."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of OWAI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue_samples.line: "Remember, please fasten your seatbelts. We'll be hitting some turbulence."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Close-up of AREEBA, smiling at Jerry.

dialogue_samples.line: "Don't worry, folks. We're going through a bit of turbulence. Just keep your seats and—"
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of OWAI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue_samples.line: "How's it looking, Areeba? Any signs of trouble?"
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of OWAI, expression intense and focused.

characters.name: TOM
characters.personality: Tom appears to be a calm and level-headed individual who tries to reassure others in times of crisis, but also shows signs of frustration and impatience.
characters.appearance: Tom is a mid-30s man with a rugged, weathered appearance, dressed in a pilot's uniform, likely worn from frequent travel and exposure to the elements.
characters.style_reference: 1970s-era disaster film, earthy tones, worn and practical clothing aesthetic.

dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Wide shot of OWAI, smiling at the passengers.
Close-up of JERRY, eyes wide with fear.

characters.name: JERRY
characters.personality: Jerry appears to be a somewhat high-strung individual, prone to outbursts of hunger or panic. He may be someone who feels out of control in chaotic situations.
characters.appearance: Jerry is likely dressed in casual, comfortable clothing suitable for a plane journey, possibly with a few wrinkles or disheveled strands of hair.
characters.style_reference: Low-budget, indie thriller, with a focus on practical, in-your-face realism and muted color palette.

dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Close-up of TOM, frustration etched on his face.
Medium shot of JERRY, expression intense and focused.

characters.name: AREEBA
characters.personality: Areeba appears to be a friendly and attentive flight attendant, motivated by a desire to ensure passenger comfort and safety.
characters.appearance: Areeba is a woman in her mid-to-late 30s, dressed in a classic airline uniform from the mid-20th century, with a warm and approachable demeanor.
characters.style_reference: Retro-futurism, 1950s-60s airline aesthetic, with a focus on clean lines, pastel colors, and a sense of nostalgia

dialogue_samples.line: "Would you like a snack, sir? We have peanuts or pretzels."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Close-up of JERRY, rummaging through his pocket for snacks.

dialogue_samples.line: "Can I get you a blanket, sir? Or a cup of water?"
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Close-up of TOM, attempting to reassure Jerry.

dialogue_samples.line: "No, Captain. Everything's looking good. Just a bit of turbulence."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Close-up of OWAI, focused on the controls.
